etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "humiliate" + "-ion" from Latin "humiliare" (to make low, humble)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Make low humble; experiencing shameful degradation and humiliation shame supported by dignity awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Make low → shameful degradation → contemporary humiliation shame and humiliation degradation that benefits from restoration growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Make low → shameful degradation → humiliation shame → restoration understanding
